name: self-hosted-ai-hw-agent
description: Agent config for Self-Hosted AI Hello World benchmarking project
instructions: You are assisting with a self-hosted AI benchmarking project.
Each model gets its own Node.js app under models/<model-name>/.
LM Studio serves at http://localhost:1234/v1/chat/completions (OpenAI-compatible API).
Follow the existing patterns in docs/ for structure and documentation.
When creating new model apps, use server.js template that calls LM Studio API with timing metrics.
Hardware: AMD RX 9070 XT (16GB VRAM) on host, MacBook Air M3 on client.
